visual_scope.primary_region: Results page 4, Proxy Similarity opener and VLM Grounding opener

change_summary: Shortened the proxy-result opener while preserving PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, CLIP, DINOv2, and 24-pair evidence values.
Removed redundant cosine wording around CLIP and DINOv2 because the metric names and values already carry the evidence.
Reframed proxy match as a gate for later task checks, not as the task claim.
Reworded the clean GRScenes opener from visual-QA/numeric-claims wording to source/noMDL QA pairs and claim-number wording.
rejected_iteration_notes: The first rewrite removed visual-/QA, nu-/meric, ren-/ders, co-/sine, and vi-/sually, but introduced QA-/clean, stan-/dard, and ev-/idence.
A second rewrite introduced screen-/ing, similar-/ity, Fig-/ure, and origi-/nal.
A third rewrite introduced ob-/ject, there-/fore, and task-/proximal.
A fourth rewrite introduced down-/stream and ta-/bles.
The accepted version removes the replacement splits in the page-4 target region.

accepted_text_scan.next_round_candidate: Page 5 contains inherited page-top Results text and Figure 3 caption splits.
